en.name: Sleeping Scapegoats
en.effect: Special Summon up to 4 "Scapegoat Tokens" (Beast/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon 1 "Swift Panther Warrior" from your Deck, also for the rest of this turn, these Tokens cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. If a card(s) you control that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 Token you control that was Special Summoned by this effect instead.

ja.name: 眠れる羊 スケープ・ゴート
